headline: Marsden Goes Rogue: Apple TV+ Greenlights High-Octane Spy Thriller 'Disavowed'
lede: James Marsden trades small-town charm for international intrigue in Apple TV+'s latest high-stakes series. The streamer has officially ordered 'Disavowed', a pulse-pounding action thriller from the writers behind 'Uncharted'.
body:
Apple TV+ is doubling down on prestige action content with 'Disavowed', a propulsive new series that positions James Marsden as a complex espionage operative. The project, created by veteran screenwriters Art Marcum and Matt Holloway, promises a gritty exploration of betrayal and survival in the shadowy world of international intelligence.

Marsden, fresh off his critically praised turn in 'Paradise', will not only star but also executive produce the series. His involvement signals a strategic pivot for the actor, who has traditionally balanced comedic and dramatic roles across film and television.

Blue Marble Pictures, the production company behind the acclaimed series 'Pachinko', will shepherd the project alongside Apple Studios. This partnership suggests a commitment to high-quality, character-driven storytelling that has become a hallmark of Apple TV+'s original programming strategy.

While plot specifics remain under wraps, industry insiders anticipate 'Disavowed' will leverage Marsden's underutilized dramatic chops and Marcum and Holloway's expertise in crafting propulsive narrative arcs. The writing duo's previous work on action blockbusters like 'Uncharted' hints at a series that will balance sophisticated character development with kinetic storytelling.
key_facts: James Marsden stars and executive produces
Created by 'Uncharted' writers Art Marcum and Matt Holloway
Part of Apple TV+'s expanding action genre lineup
